checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.scanQr: Scan this QR with any Thai banking app

order.title: Order
order.qrVerified: QR verified — escrow released to seller.
order.qrVerifyFailed: QR verification failed. Please scan again or contact support.
order.photoVerified: Receipt confirmed — escrow released to seller.
order.confirmError: Failed to confirm receipt. Please try again.
order.paymentVerifiedDate: Payment verified by the seller on {{date}}
order.paymentPending: Payment slip submitted — waiting for the seller to verify it against their bank before they ship.
order.escrowInfo: Payment verified via PromptPay. Funds are held in escrow until you confirm delivery.
order.disputeInfo: If the plant does not match the listing, you can open a dispute within 48 hours of delivery.
order.confirmReceiptDescription: Scan the QR code on the plant's tag to verify authenticity and confirm receipt. This will release funds to the seller.

statusMessages.shipped: Your plant is on the way! You will be able to confirm receipt once it arrives.
statusMessages.paid: Waiting for seller to ship. You will receive tracking info once shipped.
statusMessages.completed: Order completed — escrow released to seller. Enjoy your plant!

scanToPay: Scan with your banking app to pay {{total}} {{currency}}
paysSellerDirectly: Pays {{seller}} directly via any Thai bank
afterPayConfirm: After paying, tap the button below to confirm.
footer: Your payment is held safely until you confirm delivery. No hidden fees — the price above is all you pay.

errors.fixAddress: Please fix the errors in your shipping address.
errors.slipRequired: Please upload your payment slip so the seller can verify it.
errors.sellerNoPromptPay: This seller has not set a PromptPay ID and cannot accept payments right now.
errors.ownListing: You cannot purchase your own listing.
errors.listingUnavailable: This listing is no longer available.

toast.paymentAutoVerified: Payment verified automatically — your order is protected by escrow.
toast.paymentManual: We couldn't auto-verify your slip; the seller will review it manually.
toast.slipSubmitted: Slip submitted — the seller will verify your payment, then ship.

buyerProtection.title: Buyer Protection
buyerProtection.description: Your payment is held in escrow. The seller only receives the money after you confirm the plant arrived safely. If there's a problem, you can open a dispute within 48 hours.

confirmPayment.title: Confirm Your Payment
confirmPayment.description: After paying via your banking app, upload your payment slip. The seller verifies it against their bank before shipping — this protects you both.

markShipped.uploadLabel: Tap to add a photo of the packed box
markShipped.photoHint: Protects you in disputes — proof the plant left packed and healthy.

sellerReview.title: Leave a Seller Review
sellerReview.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience with this seller... (min 20 characters)
sellerReview.starRequired: Please select an overall star rating.
sellerReview.commentMinLength: Comment must be at least 20 characters.

dispute.orderNotFound: Order not found or you do not have access to it.
dispute.submittedDescription: Our team will review your case within 24 hours. Both parties will be notified.
dispute.warning: Escrow funds are currently frozen. Opening a dispute will pause the auto-release until our team makes a ruling. Please provide clear evidence.
